person_name: Gaius Mucius Scaevola, legendary Roman hero (early Republic)
person_name_full: Gaius Mucius Scaevola, legendary Roman hero (early Republic)
notes: Legendary Roman hero of the early Republic known for attempting to assassinate King Porsenna and demonstrating bravery by holding his hand in fire.

docs.title: Life of Poplicola
docs.author: Plutarch
docs.excerpt: … he had miscarried in it, because so brave and good a man deserved rather to be a friend to the Romans than an enemy. To this Porsenna gave credit, and thereupon expressed an inclination to a truce, not, I presume, so much out of fear of the three hundred Romans, as in admiration of the Roman
